# `@pagesmith/site`

> Pagesmith site toolkit on top of `@pagesmith/core`.

- CLI owner: `pagesmith`
- Default preset: `@pagesmith/docs/preset`
- JSX runtime: `@pagesmith/site/jsx-runtime`
- CSS bundles: `@pagesmith/site/css/*`
- Runtime JS: `@pagesmith/site/runtime/*`
- Vite SSG: `@pagesmith/site/vite`
- Shared helpers: `@pagesmith/site/ssg-utils`
- Framework-hosted apps can use just `@pagesmith/site/css/content` and `@pagesmith/site/runtime/content`

Read first:

- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/README.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/REFERENCE.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/ai-guidelines/site-guidelines.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/REFERENCE.md`
